name: City Landmarks
storyIntro: The city buildings lost their signs! Help put the right name on each building!
storyOutro: All the buildings have their names back! The city is working again!

tasks.prompt: Where do you go when you are sick? Doctors and nurses work here.
tasks.hint: It starts with 'h' and has 8 letters.

tasks.prompt: Where do you catch an airplane?
tasks.hint: Planes take off and land here.

tasks.prompt: Match each place to what you do there.
tasks.hint: Think about the purpose of each building.
It's the most important government building.

tasks.prompt: A big store where you buy food and other things.
tasks.hint: Super + market = a very big market!

tasks.prompt: A big place with many seats where you watch baseball or soccer games.
tasks.hint: It starts with 's' and has 7 letters.

tasks.prompt: The ___ has beautiful gardens. People go there to pray.
Sort: which buildings are in every city?
tasks.hint: Every city needs schools and hospitals!

tasks.prompt: In the city, there are tall buildings called ___.
tasks.hint: Many families live in them, one on top of another.

tasks.prompt: Put Ralph's city tour stops in order!
items: Then, they saw the church with beautiful gardens.
Next, they went to the City Hall Library.
Finally, they watched a game at the stadium.
